name: Lydian International Ltd.
description: Lydian International Limited is a gold-focused mineral development company that was primarily engaged in the exploration and development of precious metals assets. The company's flagship project was the Amulsar Gold Project, located in south-central Armenia. Founded in 2005 and registered in the British Crown dependency of Jersey, the corporation focused on pursuing resources in emerging and transitional geopolitical regions. Although it maintained headquarters in Greenwood Village, Colorado, the company faced significant operational challenges and blockades at its Armenian mining site, which ultimately impacted its development activities and corporate status.
